title: Sous Vide Stuffed Pancakes
description: A unique breakfast recipe featuring sous vide protein and stuffed pancakes.

ingredients.name: filling of choice (e.g. cream cheese, jam)

instructions: Prepare sous vide protein according to package instructions.
In a large bowl, whisk together pancake mix, eggs, milk, and melted butter.
Cook pancakes according to package instructions.
Once pancakes are cooked, split them in half and fill with desired filling.
Prepare sous vide protein by slicing into desired thickness.
Serve stuffed pancakes with a side of sous vide protein.
Sprinkle with powdered sugar if desired.
